description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events to the ros2-beta branch and allows manual triggering. The workflow should have a build job that runs on a matrix of ROS distributions (foxy, galactic, eloquent, dashing) and operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, ubuntu-18.04). For each combination, it should set up ROS, install RealSense SDK 2.0 dependencies, create a ROS2 workspace, check out the repository, build the project with colcon, install test packages, and run tests with a Python script.
